claim_boundary: Closed-loop AV utility is judged against the always-brake fail-safe reference. Raw closed-loop TSVR includes unavoidable initial unsafe states, so the promoted non-vacuity statistic is excess TSVR over that fail-safe plus useful-work gain.

Healthcare utility is judged against the always-alert fail-safe reference. The promoted non-vacuity statistic requires zero excess TSVR with less fallback, less intervention, and positive monitoring utility.
